caveats: Approval is for the deterministic research canary and does not authorize formal dataset registration.
Direction, 100k LOD, skeleton binding, locked-paw actions, deformation and Apartment media remain separate gates.
decisions.notes: Agent static multiview review after the user's approval of the exact FLUX.2 image. Front, back, side, top and quarter renders preserve one tail, four usable limbs and paws, a coherent white/tan-dominant coat with a compact black saddle, a closed silhouette, and no detached fragments.
